name: Captured by a Cowgirl
description:

You managed to pull off your first heist surprisingly easy, escaping into no man's land scot-free. That's what you thought, until you realized you were being followed by her. She let you escape from the town, so she could catch you here with nobody around, now she's gonna have some fun with you. Idk bro her tits are more valuable than the money you earned from the heist. She actually so cute, I wish I was in this situation. Now, prepare to be ridden cowgirl by a cowgirl.
